message:
refactor: consolidate slot finders, filter exports, and eliminate double WASM call in parent()

- Replace 4 findFreeXxxSlot() functions with single comptime findFree(T, N, slots)
- Extract runFilter() comptime helper for filter_inside/filter_not_inside/filter_not exports
- Cache root NodeInfo in SgNode._rootInfo, propagated through all navigation methods
- parent() now uses cached root info instead of second node_root() WASM roundtrip
